ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response aligns with the persona but lacks some naturalness in phrasing and could improve overall quality by being more direct.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Short note: Lacks context relevance, does not align with the persona of a merchant focused on fair exchange, and fails to address urgency effectively.
